text:
Beilei Gu
Beilei Gu is a Senior Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai. She has been teaching Chinese to college students in both the U.S. And China for more than 10 years, with formal training on the subject from New York University Steinhardt School of Culture, Education and Human Development.
Prior to joining NYU Shanghai in 2014, she had taught Chinese as second language at the Northwestern University Department of Asian Languages and Cultures in Evanston Illinois, Baruch College of The City University of New York and the China Institute at New York.
Education
MA, Foreign Language Education; Teaching Chinese as a Second LanguageNew York University
Local Culture and History of Shanghai
Advanced Chinese II
Shanghai Architecture for Chinese Language Learners
